title: Gnomeland
description: Gnomes with different types such as bosses and guards and structures.
body:
There are now **gnomes** in Minecraft. The mod adds mobs, structures and weapons.

Here are the structures :

- Gnome Palace : Gnome palaces are buildings with 2 towers that are connected to each other with a bridge. It has good loots, gnomes and the Gnome Chief in it.
![The palace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1026bfbbf381f0318f6685f6c1fc6d9dbb8e617e_0.webp)  
- Gnome Nest : Gnome nests are tiny houses made with dirt that has gnome house blocks and barrels in it.![Nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ba00e455f07affd475185dc34dacfec5361e81.png)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack.

Made by wl891.
